nasb.text: For if that first covenant had been faultless, there would have been no occasion sought for a second.

esv.text: For if that first covenant had been faultless, there would have been no occasion to look for a second.

cnv.text: 如果頭一個約沒有缺點，就沒有尋求另一個約的必要了。

ccb.text: 因为如果第一个约没有缺点，就不必另立新约了。

csbs.text: 原来，如果那第一个约是无可指责的，就没有寻求第二个约的必要了，
